title: astrolepis cochisensis
intro: Astrolepis cochisensis, also known as Cochi's lipfern or Cochis lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. Native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Astrolepis cochisensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
